data_description.primary_agent:
The first conversation agent that all requests will go to. 
Recommended to be the fastest agent you have that is also local-only, even if it isn't very good at responding.
data_description.fallback_agent:
The backup conversation agent incase the primary agent is unable to handle the request. 
This is where you may use an cloud service or a very slow conversation agent.
data_description.enable_dialog_bypass: If enabled, phrases matching your automation dialog catalog bypass translator handling.
data_description.dialog_bypass_min_score: Fuzzy score threshold for dialog bypass phrase matching (0.0-1.0).
data_description.dialog_yaml_path: Path to dialog phrases YAML file, default: /config/fallback_conversation/dialog_phrases.yaml
data_description.include_conversation_trigger_scan: If enabled, scan conversation triggers from automation YAML and blueprints.
